audit_items.proof_trace: Both transfers use SafeERC20 safe variants that revert on failure, making any failure roll back the entire transaction. The `assetOut` address is captured to a local variable (L446) before the optional callback fires, preventing `s_assetOut` mutation from affecting the transfer target. If `bid()` returns without reverting, both `safeTransfer(msg.sender, amount)` (L444) and `safeTransferFrom(msg.sender, address(this), assetOutAmount)` (L453) completed successfully, satisfying both post-conditions atomically.
